paragraphs.greek: Ο Αλεξ περπατάει στο αεροδρόμιο. Βλέπει μια μεγάλη πινακίδα: ΕΞΟΔΟΣ.
paragraphs.english: Alex walks through the airport. He sees a big sign: EXIT.
paragraphs.swedish: Alex går genom flygplatsen. Han ser en stor skylt: UTGÅNG.

paragraphs.greek: Δίπλα υπάρχει μια άλλη πινακίδα: ΕΙΣΟΔΟΣ. Και μια ακόμα: ΜΕΤΡΟ. Και ένα κίτρινο ΤΑΞΙ.
paragraphs.english: Next to it there is another sign: ENTRANCE. And one more: METRO. And a yellow TAXI.
paragraphs.swedish: Bredvid finns en annan skylt: INGÅNG. Och en till: METRO. Och en gul TAXI.
paragraphs.speakerNote: Alex reads more signs and starts recognizing consonants

comprehensionQuestions.answerGreek: Βλέπει πινακίδες: ΕΞΟΔΟΣ, ΕΙΣΟΔΟΣ, ΜΕΤΡΟ, ΤΑΞΙ.

answer.en: He sees signs: EXIT, ENTRANCE, METRO, TAXI.
answer.sv: Han ser skyltar: UTGÅNG, INGÅNG, METRO, TAXI.

title.en: First Consonants: Κ, Λ, Μ, Ν, Σ/ς
title.sv: Första konsonanterna: Κ, Λ, Μ, Ν, Σ/ς

explanation.en: Time for consonants! These five are easy because they sound similar to their Latin equivalents. Κ = K, Λ = L, Μ = M, Ν = N, Σ = S. Notice that Σ has a special form ς when it comes at the END of a word (like in ΕΞΟΔΟΣ → έξοδος).
explanation.sv: Dags för konsonanter! Dessa fem är enkla eftersom de låter som sina latinska motsvarigheter. Κ = K, Λ = L, Μ = M, Ν = N, Σ = S. Observera att Σ har en specialform ς när den kommer i SLUTET av ett ord (som i ΕΞΟΔΟΣ → έξοδος).

instruction.en: Σ / σ / ς = S sound (ς at end of word)
instruction.sv: Σ / σ / ς = S-ljud (ς i slutet av ord)

buildingBlocks.greek: Σ σ ς — σα, σε, σι

label.en: Notice the final Σ becomes ς in lowercase: έξοδος
label.sv: Lägg märke till att slutliga Σ blir ς i gemener: έξοδος

grammarSpotlight.swedishParallel: These consonants are your friends — K, L, M, N, S sound the same in Swedish! The only thing to remember is the special final-sigma: ς. Think of it like how Swedish 's' stays the same everywhere, but Greek 's' dresses up at the end of a word.

prompt.en: What does this Greek word mean?

hint.en: You see this sign when leaving a building.
hint.sv: Du ser denna skylt när du lämnar en byggnad.

prompt.en: What does this Greek word mean?
Review: What sound does the Greek letter Η make?
prompt.sv: Repetition: Vilket ljud gör den grekiska bokstaven Η?

hint.en: Remember — it looks like H but sounds like 'ee'!
hint.sv: Kom ihåg — det ser ut som H men låter som 'i'!

prompt.en: Review: How do you say 'no' in Greek?
prompt.sv: Repetition: Hur säger man 'nej' på grekiska?
